{{Quote|I have certain information regarding a meddling band of Rogue Corsec and an insignificant Drall Patriots Hideout.|[[Karin Featherlight]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:KF">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=herald|Karin Featherlight|Corellia}}</ref>}}
The '''Drall Patriot's Cave''' was a cave located on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] and inhabited by a gang of anti-government [[Drall (planet)|Drall]] known as the [[Drall Patriots]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
{{Quote|While campaigning across this forsaken planet, my people came across it.|Karin Featherlight, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:KF" />}}
Located in the [[Agrilat Region|Agrilat Swamp]], the cave was inhabited by the Drall Patriots, a group of Drall extremists fighting for the independence of [[Drall (planet)|Drall]] from the [[Diktat|unified government]] of the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]]. It was rumored that this vast network of caves were the epicenter of their operations.<ref name="SWG:DPC" />

After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], people campaigning across Corellia to support the politician [[Karin Featherlight]] discovered the cave.<ref name="SWG:KF" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> a spacer visited the cave and collected an [[Ion relic pistol|oppressor pistol]].<ref name="SWG:RPWMII">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=collection|Rare Pistol Weapons Mark II}}</ref>
